CSV ↔ JSON Converter

Paste CSV and get JSON — or the other way round — with live preview, delimiter auto-detect and tidy quoting. Everything happens in your browser.

Tip: drop a .csv, .tsv or .json file anywhere on this page to load it.

Everything runs in your browser — nothing you paste is uploaded · a max tool
